heading: cyUpload files to support your counterclaim
guidanceText: cyYou should only upload files that are relevant to your counterclaim.
guidanceText2: cyThe claimant will be able to see any files you upload.
beforeUploadText: cyBefore you upload the file give it a name that tells the court what it is, for example 'Job offer letter'.
fileTypesText: cyEach file must be less than 500MB. You can upload the following file types: DOC/DOCX (Word), XLS/XLSM (Excel), PPT/PPTX (PowerPoint), PDF, RTF, TXT, CSV, JPG/JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIF/TIFF.

errors.documents: cySelect a file to support your counterclaim
